title: Print Config
description: Print Config v1 contract for print payload, QR/barcode, label, and public trace readiness. Printers must not create operational source-of-truth codes.
$comment: Sources: PACK-02 Print Config and PHIEU TU SINH print rules. TODO: barcode/QR payload formats are not finalized in Phase 2.

qr_required.description: Whether QR is required for trace/public trace.

generated_by_system.description: True when print data is generated by the system from operational source data, not by printer-side business logic.

source_object_required.description: Whether source object linkage is required before printing.
